description: Fix 7 bugs identified in code review: hardcoded client ID, dropped n param, unrefreshable connection warning, upstream error leak, || vs ?? fallback, missing normalizeImageResponse case, dead format config.
steps: 1. Fix hardcoded client ID in testUtils.ts - import SUPERGROK_CONFIG and use .clientId
2. Fix dropped n parameter in buildImageBody xAI case
3. Fix unrefreshable connection - add ephemeral flag and warning in response
4. Fix upstream error text leak - truncate and use generic message
5. Fix expiresIn fallback - use ?? instead of ||
6. Add explicit normalizeImageResponse case for xAI
7. Remove dead format field from IMAGE_PROVIDERS.xai
acceptance_criteria: SUPERGROK_CONFIG.clientId used instead of hardcoded string in testUtils.ts
xAI image body includes n parameter
Import route returns warning when refreshToken is not provided and sets ephemeral flag
Refresh failure does not leak raw upstream error text
expiresIn uses nullish coalescing (??) for 0-safe fallback
IMAGE_PROVIDERS.xai does not have unused format field
All verification commands pass: typecheck, lint, test, build
